title: Duplicate tuples with inner SELECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, link VARCHAR(255), term VARCHAR(255));

INSERT INTO test_table (id, link, term) VALUES (1, 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/Fiat_500', 'term1'), (2, 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/Fiat_500', 'term2'), (3, 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/Fiat_500', NULL);
CREATE TABLE label_table (link VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);

SELECT test_table.link, label_table.label, COUNT(test_table.term) AS count FROM test_table JOIN label_table ON test_table.link = label_table.link GROUP BY test_table.link, label_table.label HAVING COUNT(test_table.term) > 0;
key_bug_features: Duplicate tuples with inner SELECT query execution
